subject: [PATCH v4 04/21] zswap: add new helpers for zswap entry operations

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch adds new helper functions to abstract away zswap entry operations, making it easier to re-implement these functions when swap is virtualized. The new helpers include storing, loading, erasing, and checking if a zswap entry is empty. These functions use the xarray data structure to manage the zswap entries. The patch modifies several existing functions in the mm/zswap.c file to use the new helpers instead of directly accessing the xarray.
